brief.goal: Learner self-study inflation workshop: CPI, GDP deflator, household scenarios, and policy communication for first-year economics.

delivery_notes.consolidation_requirement: The final activity requires learners to synthesize their understanding into a personal inflation management plan and reflect on key takeaways from the session.
